subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The letter which thou didst address to the Most Exalted Leaf hath been perused. As to the matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله نامه که بحضرت ورقه العلیاء مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه شد در مسئله
subcodes.subjects: @veiling [hijab], @role and station of women, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
